create.noStats: No creature statistics selected. Please choose a CR or archetype.
create.failed: Failed to create creature. Check the console for details.
create.unsupportedSystem: This game system is not supported by Quick Creatures.

defaultType.name: Default Creature Type
defaultType.hint: Default monster type when opening Quick Creatures.

defaultSize.name: Default Size
defaultSize.hint: Default creature size when opening Quick Creatures.

defaultCR.name: Default Challenge Rating
defaultCR.hint: Default CR when opening the CR tab.

defaultDynamicRing.name: Default Dynamic Ring
defaultDynamicRing.hint: Whether the Dynamic Ring checkbox is on by default.

defaultAdvancedMode.name: Default Advanced Mode
defaultAdvancedMode.hint: Open Quick Creatures with Advanced controls enabled for Creatures by CR.

defaultTokenSet.name: Default Token Set
defaultTokenSet.hint: Default token pack used for creature portraits.

enableDndMonsterManualTokens.name: Use D&D Monster Manual Tokens
enableDndMonsterManualTokens.hint: When the dnd-monster-manual module is active, offer its artwork as a Quick Creatures token set.

enableTovMonsterVaultTokens.name: Use Monster Vault Tokens
enableTovMonsterVaultTokens.hint: When the kp-tov-monster-vault module is active, offer its artwork as a Quick Creatures token set.

enableTovMonsterVault2Tokens.name: Use Monster Vault 2 Tokens
enableTovMonsterVault2Tokens.hint: When the kp-tov-monster-vault-2 module is active, offer its artwork as a Quick Creatures token set.

enablePathfinderTokensBestiaries.name: Use Pathfinder Tokens: Bestiaries
enablePathfinderTokensBestiaries.hint: When the pf2e-tokens-bestiaries module is active, offer its artwork as a Quick Creatures token set.

enablePathfinderTokensMonsterCore.name: Use Pathfinder Tokens: Monster Core
enablePathfinderTokensMonsterCore.hint: When the pf2e-tokens-monster-core module is active, offer its artwork as a Quick Creatures token set.

enablePathfinderTokensMonsterCore2.name: Use Pathfinder Tokens: Monster Core 2
enablePathfinderTokensMonsterCore2.hint: When the pf2e-tokens-monster-core-2 module is active, offer its artwork as a Quick Creatures token set.

defaultArchetype.name: Default Archetype
defaultArchetype.hint: Default archetype when opening the Archetype tab.

customTokenDirectory.name: Custom Token Directory
customTokenDirectory.hint: Data folder containing custom Quick Creatures token-set folders.

enableOriginalTokens.name: Use Original Tokens
enableOriginalTokens.hint: Offer the built-in Original Tokens set.

enableCuteTokens.name: Use Cute Tokens
enableCuteTokens.hint: Offer the built-in Cute Tokens set.

enableA5eSystemTokens.name: Use A5E System Tokens
enableA5eSystemTokens.hint: Offer A5E system token assets when the A5E system is installed.

enableA5eMonstrousMenagerieTokens.name: Use Monstrous Menagerie Tokens
enableA5eMonstrousMenagerieTokens.hint: Offer Monstrous Menagerie tokens discovered in the custom token directory.

enableA5eMonstrousMenagerie2Tokens.name: Use Monstrous Menagerie 2 Tokens
enableA5eMonstrousMenagerie2Tokens.hint: Offer Monstrous Menagerie 2 tokens discovered in the custom token directory.

configureTokens.name: Configure Tokens
configureTokens.label: Configure Tokens
configureTokens.hint: Open the Quick Creatures token set configuration screen.

tokenConfig.title: Quick Creatures Token Sets
tokenConfig.noCustomSets: No custom token sets found in the selected directory.
tokenConfig.a5eOverlapHint: A5E System and Monstrous Menagerie are nearly the same set of tokens. You should probably only select one.

status.a5eSystemNotDetected: Not installed. Install the Game System from the Foundry Setup screen.
status.a5eSystemDetected: These tokens are large and will hide any dynamic ring.
status.mmNotDetected: Not detected. Add the token folder to the Custom Token Directory.

sections.defaults: Default Token Set + Custom Token Directory
